import subprocess

# Check if ollama exists
which = subprocess.run('which ollama', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
if not which.stdout.strip():
    result = 'NOT_INSTALLED'
else:
    # Check if running
    ps = subprocess.run('pgrep -a ollama', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if 'ollama' in ps.stdout:
        # Check models
        models = subprocess.run('ollama list 2>&1', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        result = 'RUNNING: ' + models.stdout[:300]
    else:
        result = 'INSTALLED_NOT_RUNNING'
